---
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: false
    title-slide: false
    css: styles_reveal.css
---

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide1.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide2.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide3.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide4.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide5.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide6.png){width="100%"}

## {.fullscreen}

![](slides/slide7.png){width="100%"}
